thesis: Unusual options flow (95 score) combined with perfect momentum (100) suggests institutional positioning ahead of potential AI/cloud announcements. The narrow market leadership favors mega-cap tech outperformance, and MSFT's defensive qualities make it ideal for a normal-VIX week with macro uncertainty.

thesis: Strong momentum (100) meets oversold mean reversion setup (84), creating a high-probability bounce play in fintech. As a high-beta name uncorrelated with mega-cap tech, SOFI provides portfolio diversification while the sector rotation into financials continues.
